panels.title: Active Users (Approved AI Tools)
panels.description: Framework target: >70% of employees using approved tools

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS active_users FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS total_spend FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.title: DLP Blocks (30d)
panels.description: Data Loss Prevention policy enforcement â€” higher is more protective

panels.title: Daily Spend by Team
panels.description: Budget compliance â€” tracks team spend against allocated budgets

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, team_id, COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS spend FROM "LiteLLM_DailyTeamSpend" WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date, team_id ORDER BY date
SELECT date AS time, api_key, COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS spend FROM "LiteLLM_DailyUserSpend" WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date, api_key ORDER BY date

panels.title: Model Usage Distribution
panels.description: Which models are being used â€” verify approved model compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY model ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT date_trunc('hour', "startTime") AS time, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Track API errors â€” framework target: >95% success rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "startTime") AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'success') AS errors, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT "user" AS username, COUNT(*) AS requests, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, ROUND(SUM(spend)::numeric, 4) AS total_spend FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND "user" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "user" ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Audit Log (Recent)
panels.description: Accountability â€” all admin actions logged

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM "LiteLLM_AuditLog" ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Topic Distribution (30d)
panels.description: What are users asking AI about? Categories from keyword analysis.

targets.rawSql: SELECT category, total_matches FROM topic_distribution ORDER BY total_matches DESC

panels.title: Keyword Trends (30d)
panels.description: Daily keyword category match volume â€” detect shifts in AI usage patterns

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, category, SUM(match_count) AS matches FROM keyword_daily_summary WHERE day > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day, category ORDER BY day

panels.title: Flagged Requests (Critical/High)
panels.description: Requests matching critical or high-severity keywords â€” requires compliance review

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_time, username, team_id, model, category, keyword, severity, spend, LEFT(message_text, 200) AS message_preview FROM flagged_requests WHERE request_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Keywords (30d)
panels.description: Most frequently matched keywords across all requests

targets.rawSql: SELECT keyword, category, SUM(match_count) AS total_matches FROM keyword_daily_summary WHERE day > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY keyword, category ORDER BY total_matches DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Flagged Keywords by Team (30d)
panels.description: Which teams trigger high/critical keyword flags â€” governance tier alignment check

targets.rawSql: SELECT team_id, category, keyword, severity, SUM(match_count) AS total_matches, SUM(unique_users) AS unique_users, SUM(total_spend) AS spend FROM keyword_daily_summary WHERE day > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND severity IN ('critical', 'high') GROUP BY team_id, category, keyword, severity ORDER BY total_matches DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Change Management Pipeline
panels.description: Governance change proposals by status â€” tracks the approval workflow

targets.rawSql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM governance_changes GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: AI Advisor Suggestions (30d)
panels.description: AI-generated governance improvement proposals by category

targets.rawSql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM governance_changes WHERE source = 'ai_advisor' AND proposed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY category

panels.title: Sync History
panels.description: Central repository sync status over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT sync_at, status, records_exported, duration_ms, error_message FROM governance_sync_log ORDER BY sync_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Framework Version History
panels.description: Approved and implemented governance framework changes with full audit trail

targets.rawSql: SELECT gc.id, gc.title, gc.category, gc.source, gc.proposed_by, gc.proposed_at, gc.status, gc.reviewed_by, gc.reviewed_at, gc.framework_version, gc.implemented_at FROM governance_changes gc WHERE gc.status IN ('approved', 'implemented') ORDER BY gc.proposed_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Audit Chain Entries
panels.description: Hash-chained audit trail â€” tamper-evident record of all governance events

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, event_type, COUNT(*) AS events FROM governance_audit_chain WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Chain Integrity
panels.description: Latest chain hash and entry count â€” verify at /governance/api/v1/audit/chain/verify

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries, MAX(sequence) AS latest_sequence FROM governance_audit_chain
SELECT sequence, event_type, LEFT(chain_hash, 16) AS hash_prefix, created_at FROM governance_audit_chain ORDER BY sequence DESC LIMIT 10
